build.buildCommand: echo '--- BUILDING PORTAL ---' && ls -la && (mkdir -p portal/src/lib/data/whitepapers portal/src/lib/data/source || true) && (cp -rv whitepapers/. portal/src/lib/data/whitepapers/ || echo 'No whitepapers found') && (cp -rv source/. portal/src/lib/data/source/ || echo 'No source elements found') && cd portal && npm install && npm run build
